subject: Young fighter with purple hair in a fighting stance, wearing a gi and jacket, with bright energy effects in the background
description: A young male fighter leans forward in a dynamic rushing pose. The figure has distinctively purple hair and wears a blue gi top with a brown open jacket over it. The stance is mid-rush or aggressive step forward. The background features bright white-yellow light burst effects and a stylized sky, giving the image a high-speed, high-energy feel. The composition is a mid-shot capturing the figure from roughly the thighs up, with the emphasis on forward momentum.
foreground: young fighter with purple hair, blue gi, brown open jacket, forward-rushing stance
background: bright white-yellow energy burst, stylized sky
